title: carex leporina var. ovata
intro: Carex leporina var. ovata, also known as Hare's Tail Grass, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex leporina var. ovata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and relieve digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
